reasoning: The NFL owners will meet May 20-21, 2025, providing a clear window for this to happen before the June 1 deadline. While an initial proposal by the Packers in April fell short with only about 16 teams supporting it (24 needed to pass), the issue was specifically tabled to rework the language. Recent reporting from early May (including CBS Sports and the Washington Post) indicates that a revised, expanded proposal to ban pushing/pulling the ballcarrier has broad momentum, with the league office reportedly supporting the change. Given the specific timing of the May meeting, the concerted effort to revise the proposal, and the influential weight of the league office, the ban seems more likely than not to pass, though crossing the 24-vote threshold remains a notable hurdle.
